question: Which of the following statements about CSPF is FALSE?
options: CSPF is used to make a path calculation with additional administrative constraints.
The CSPF calculation is always performed on every LSP signalled by RSVP-TE.
The head-end router performs the CSPF calculation for an LSP.
CSPF consults the TED to calculate the LSP path.
correct_answers: The CSPF calculation is always performed on every LSP signalled by RSVP-TE.

question: In a network of Nokia routers running LDP, all routers advertise labels to their peers. Which labels, if any, are discarded by the receiving router and not added to the LIB?
options: Any label that doesn't match an import policy.
Any label that doesn't match an export policy.
Any label received from a router that is not the next hop for the FEC.
No labels are discarded; they are all added to the LIB.
correct_answers: No labels are discarded; they are all added to the LIB.

question: An MPLS router is signalled a label of 3 for a FEC by its downstream router. What does the router do when it receives a data packet for this FEC from an upstream router?
options: It performs a label SWAP and transmits the data packet with a label of 3.
It PUSHes a label of 3 and transmits the data packet.
It silently discards the packet.
It POPs the outer label and forwards the data packet to the downstream router.
correct_answers: It POPs the outer label and forwards the data packet to the downstream router.

question: Which statement is TRUE regarding a 6PE network running over Nokia 7750 SAs?
options: The outer label is an MPLS transport label and the inner label is an IPv6 implicit null label.
The outer label is an MPLS transport label and the inner label is an IPv4 implicit null label.
It is used by a service provider to tunnel IPv6 traffic over an IPv4 MPLS network.
It is used by a service provider to tunnel IPv4 traffic over an IPv6 network.
correct_answers: It is used by a service provider to tunnel IPv6 traffic over an IPv4 MPLS network.

question: Which of the following attributes is NOT carried in an OSPF Type 10 LSA?
options: Maximum bandwidth
IGP metric
Administrative groups
Unreserved bandwidth
Maximum reservable bandwidth
